basics.name: Benjamin Shiue-Hal Chou
basics.label: Graduate Research Assistant in Electrical and Computer Engineering
basics.summary: Currently a Master's student in Electrical and Computer Engineering at Purdue University with a focus on Deep Learning, Reinforcement Learning, and Computer Communication Networks. Dedicated to innovative projects and research in AI and machine learning.

work.name: SERIS Lab under Prof. Yung-Hsiang Lu, Purdue University
work.summary: Developed an AI teaching model for musical performances and enhanced Vision Transformers through self-supervised pretraining. Innovated cross-dataset pretraining for model robustness.

work.name: LocaLens
work.summary: Founded a startup for a travel app focusing on menu translation, currency conversion, and allergen detection. Led product development and team management.

work.name: National Cheng Kung University
work.position: Research Assistant under Prof. Hsun-Ping Hsieh
work.summary: Developed models for cancer screening predictions and analyzed manufacturing defects in flash chips using data science techniques.

education.institution: National Cheng Kung University (NCKU Purdue 3+1+1 Program)

projects.name: Cancer Screening Prediction Model
projects.summary: Developed a model that improved efficiency for cancer screenings by 83% by predicting at-risk patients using Python, XGBoost, LightGBM.

projects.name: Winbond EQC Failure Analysis
projects.summary: Devised Gaussian Kernels for EQC failure tracing, enhancing accuracy with model ensemble using Scikit-Learn.

projects.name: Multi-Agent Self-Play for Beating Atari Games
projects.summary: Analyzed efficacy of self-play in multi-agent games with Reinforcement Learning algorithms like DQN and PPO using OpenAI Gym, PettingZoo, Pytorch.
highlights: Efficacy analysis of self-play in multi-agent games

projects.name: Waymo 2D Object Detection
projects.summary: Trained YOLOv8 with competition grade autonomous car dataset on M2 Max chip and achieved 0.64 AP using YOLOv8, Dask, gsutil, Metal Performance Shaders.

projects.name: Spectral Image Inpainting with Deep Learning
projects.summary: Implemented a hybrid image reconstruction framework that outperformed competitors in speed and accuracy by fusing ADMM convex optimization with Adam optimizer using MATLAB.
